title: dunnaria dunnii
intro: Dunnaria dunnii, also known as Dunn's dunnaria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dunnaria dunnii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Dunnaria dunnii is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used to make tonics and salves.
